title: DFU - Disconnecting/connecting earbuds to check DFU Pop Up
scenario: DFU pop-up "Update currently not available, please try back later" persists after reconnecting earbud disconnected during firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure both earbuds are connected to the app.
3. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update.
4. Tap the "Update" button to start the firmware update process.
5. While the update is in progress, disconnect the right earbud by placing it in the charge case.
7. Observe the pop-up message displayed on screen.
8. Reconnect the right earbud (remove it from the charge case and allow it to pair).
9. Verify the pop-up message is still displayed on screen.
10. Dismiss the pop-up by tapping outside the pop-up or tapping the close/dismiss option.
11. Confirm the user is returned to the Software Update screen.

12. Repeat steps 5–11 for the left earbud (disconnect the left earbud by placing it in the charge case, tap Update, observe pop-up, reconnect, verify pop-up persists, dismiss, and confirm return to Software Update screen).
expected: A pop-up message appears stating: \"Update currently not available, please try back later.\" The pop-up persists after reconnecting the disconnected earbud. Dismissing the pop-up returns the user to the Software Update screen.
